data.title: Introducing AWCMS-Micro

featured_image.alt: Laptop workspace running an AWCMS-Micro site

data.excerpt: Why AWCMS-Micro keeps EmDash core intact while shaping a tighter single-tenant implementation.

children.text: AWCMS-Micro is designed as a practical EmDash implementation that keeps upstream behavior intact while delivering a focused content and governance experience for one production site.

data.title: Memperkenalkan AWCMS-Micro
data.excerpt: Mengapa AWCMS-Micro menjaga core EmDash tetap utuh sambil membentuk implementasi single-tenant yang lebih rapat.

children.text: AWCMS-Micro dirancang sebagai implementasi EmDash yang praktis, menjaga perilaku upstream tetap utuh sambil menghadirkan pengalaman konten dan tata kelola yang terfokus untuk satu situs produksi.

data.title: Public Site Now Mirrors Admin Workflow
data.summary: Menus, search, content routes, and site identity are now driven from EmDash-managed data.

children.text: Editors can update posts, pages, and site settings from the standard EmDash admin routes and immediately see the results reflected on the public-facing website structure.

data.title: Situs Publik Kini Mencerminkan Alur Kerja Admin
data.summary: Menu, pencarian, route konten, dan identitas situs kini digerakkan dari data yang dikelola EmDash.

children.text: Editor dapat memperbarui pos, halaman, dan pengaturan situs dari route admin EmDash standar dan langsung melihat hasilnya tercermin pada struktur situs publik.
AWCMS-Micro packages a slimmer EmDash website experience, keeps upstream core untouched, and adds only project-level templates, content, and example governance surfaces where needed.

AWCMS-Micro mengemas pengalaman situs EmDash yang lebih ramping, menjaga core upstream tetap utuh, dan hanya menambahkan template tingkat proyek, konten, dan surface tata kelola contoh bila diperlukan.
Use this page as the editable landing guide for visitors. Editors can update the copy from Pages, then promote it into the navigation or homepage spotlights.
Gunakan halaman ini sebagai panduan landing yang bisa diedit untuk pengunjung. Editor dapat memperbarui copy dari Pages lalu mempromosikannya ke navigasi atau sorotan beranda.
This page captures the editorial flow for posts, news, and pages. Keep it current so admins can use it as a quick reference while publishing.
Halaman ini merangkum alur editorial untuk pos, berita, dan halaman. Jaga tetap mutakhir agar admin dapat menjadikannya referensi cepat saat publikasi.
Use this page to track documentation priorities, release notes, and public reference links that the docs page can surface.
Gunakan halaman ini untuk melacak prioritas dokumentasi, catatan rilis, dan tautan referensi publik yang bisa ditampilkan halaman docs.

data.title: Web & App Development
data.description: Modern web & app development with Supabase, React, Flutter, Cloudflare, and GitHub.

children.text: In a fast-paced digital era, responsive, fast, and secure web and mobile applications are key to winning business competition. AhliWeb delivers professional, enterprise-grade software engineering services, ranging from interactive landing pages to complex custom application systems.
: High-converting websites optimized for SEO and loading speed (Core Web Vitals).
: Built using React, Next.js, and Vite for highly responsive user interfaces.
: Single codebase development for Android & iOS using Flutter, saving time and cost.
: Reliable database integration with Supabase, PostgreSQL, and secure API gateways.
: Integrated e-learning and school administration solutions with RFID integration for automatic attendance tracking.
: Implementation of mobile face recognition attendance systems to prevent attendance fraud.
: AWCMS-Micro ecosystem — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and AI support.
: Astro, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
: Flutter, Dart, Android & iOS Native Bridges
: Cloudflare Workers/D1/R2, Supabase, Node.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis
: GitHub Actions, Automated Testing, ESLint & Prettier, AI-assisted code review
We use a transparent Agile Scrum workflow. Here is a visualization of the modern multiplatform application architecture we design for our clients:

content.code:
graph TD
    UserMobile[Mobile App - Flutter] -->|HTTPS / WSS| APIGateway[Cloudflare WAF / API Gateway]
    UserWeb[Web App - React/Next.js] -->|HTTPS / WSS| APIGateway
    APIGateway -->|Routing| Backend[Node.js / Supabase Edge Functions]
    Backend -->|Session Management & Cache| Cache[(Redis Cache)]
    Backend -->|Data Query| DB[(PostgreSQL Database)]
    Backend -->|Face Verification| FaceAI[Face Recognition AI Engine]
    Backend -->|Log & Monitor| Logger[ClickHouse / Grafana]

children.text: We build on a flexible in-house ecosystem so you can start fast and grow in stages:
dynamic website & application** development (content, multi-user, and interactive databases).
before evolving into a more dynamic system (this very site is built with it).
100% free service for MSMEs (UMKM)**, helping micro-businesses establish a digital presence at no cost.
AI can be added as a supporting layer on your application — automation, analytics, and computer vision:

content.code:
graph LR
    Input[User Input / Data / Image] --> Engine[AI Engine]
    Engine --> NLP[Chatbot & NLP]
    Engine --> Vision[Computer Vision]
    Engine --> Analytics[Predictive Analytics]
    NLP --> Output[Automated Output & Recommendations]
    Vision --> Output
    Analytics --> Output

children.text: : We provide free bug and error fixes for 6 months after application handover.
: We guarantee a Google Lighthouse score of at least 90 on the main desktop landing page.
: All code is managed via private GitHub repositories with automated security audits for third-party libraries.
: Partnership agreements (Istishna' or Ijarah) are agreed upon in advance with a clear Scope of Work, avoiding unilateral price changes.

data.title: Web & App Development
data.description: Pengembangan web & aplikasi modern dengan Supabase, React, Flutter, Cloudflare, dan GitHub.

children.text: Di era digital yang serba cepat, aplikasi web dan mobile yang responsif, cepat, dan aman adalah kunci untuk memenangkan persaingan bisnis. AhliWeb menghadirkan layanan rekayasa perangkat lunak (software engineering) profesional berskala enterprise, mulai dari landing page interaktif hingga sistem aplikasi kustom yang kompleks.
: Website dengan konversi tinggi yang dioptimalkan untuk SEO dan kecepatan akses (Core Web Vitals).
: Menggunakan teknologi React, Next.js, dan Vite untuk performa antarmuka yang sangat responsif.
: Pengembangan satu basis kode (single codebase) untuk Android & iOS menggunakan Flutter, menghemat waktu dan biaya pengembangan.
: Integrasi database handal dengan Supabase, PostgreSQL, serta API gateway yang aman.
: Solusi e-learning dan administrasi sekolah terpadu dengan integrasi RFID untuk presensi dan absensi otomatis.
: Implementasi presensi berbasis pengenalan wajah (Face Recognition AI) untuk pencegahan kecurangan absensi.
: Ekosistem AWCMS-Micro — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, dan dukungan AI.
: Astro, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
: Flutter, Dart, Android & iOS Native Bridges
: Cloudflare Workers/D1/R2, Supabase, Node.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis
: GitHub Actions, Automated Testing, ESLint & Prettier, tinjauan kode berbantuan AI
Kami menggunakan alur kerja Agile Scrum yang transparan. Berikut gambaran arsitektur aplikasi multiplatform modern yang kami rancang untuk klien kami:

content.code:
graph TD
    UserMobile[Aplikasi Mobile - Flutter] -->|HTTPS / WSS| APIGateway[Cloudflare WAF / API Gateway]
    UserWeb[Aplikasi Web - React/Next.js] -->|HTTPS / WSS| APIGateway
    APIGateway -->|Routing| Backend[Node.js / Supabase Edge Functions]
    Backend -->|Manajemen Sesi & Cache| Cache[(Redis Cache)]
    Backend -->|Kueri Data| DB[(PostgreSQL Database)]
    Backend -->|Verifikasi Wajah| FaceAI[Face Recognition AI Engine]
    Backend -->|Log & Monitor| Logger[ClickHouse / Grafana]

children.text: Kami membangun di atas ekosistem internal yang fleksibel agar Anda dapat memulai cepat dan berkembang bertahap:
website & aplikasi dinamis** (konten, multi-pengguna, dan basis data interaktif).
peluncuran sebelum dikembangkan menjadi sistem yang lebih dinamis (situs ini sendiri dibangun dengannya).
100% gratis untuk UMKM** untuk membantu pelaku usaha mikro hadir secara digital tanpa biaya.
AI dapat ditambahkan sebagai lapisan pendukung pada aplikasi Anda — otomasi, analitik, hingga computer vision:

content.code:
graph LR
    Input[Input Pengguna / Data / Gambar] --> Engine[AI Engine]
    Engine --> NLP[Chatbot & NLP]
    Engine --> Vision[Computer Vision]
    Engine --> Analytics[Analitik Prediktif]
    NLP --> Output[Output Otomatis & Rekomendasi]
    Vision --> Output
    Analytics --> Output

children.text: : Kami memberikan perbaikan bug dan error gratis selama 6 bulan setelah serah terima aplikasi.
: Kami menjamin skor Google Lighthouse minimal 90 pada halaman utama perangkat desktop.
: Seluruh kode dikelola via repositori GitHub privat dengan audit keamanan otomatis untuk library pihak ketiga.
: Kontrak kerja sama (Istishna' atau Ijarah) disepakati di awal dengan rincian Scope of Work yang jelas tanpa perubahan harga sepihak.

data.title: Domain & Cloud Hosting
data.description: Regulation-compliant domain names & uncompromisingly reliable hosting. Edge CDN, DNSSEC & automatic backups.

children.text: A solid digital infrastructure is the cornerstone of your online business success. AhliWeb provides official domain registration and enterprise-class cloud hosting designed for speed, security, and high reliability without compromise.
: Partnership with PANDI for `.id`, `.co.id`, `.web.id` registrations, as well as global premium domain registration (`.com`, `.net`, `.org`).
storage with RAID architecture for data-loss protection.
: Equipped with Imunify360, active malware protection,
to separate servers to mitigate disaster risks.
: AWCMS-Micro ecosystem — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and AI support.
: Cloudflare Workers/Pages (global edge), Cloudflare D1 (database) & R2 (object storage), deploy via GitHub
: LiteSpeed Enterprise + LSCache, cPanel / DirectAdmin for apps such as WordPress
: NVMe SSD Enterprise RAID-10 + Cloudflare R2
: PostgreSQL / MariaDB Optimized Engine, Cloudflare D1
: SSL Let's Encrypt (Free Forever), DNSSEC, Imunify360, Cloudflare WAF
The following diagram illustrates our cloud hosting network architecture integrated with global CDN and multi-layered security protection:

content.code:
graph TD
    Client[User/Visitor] -->|Access Website| DNS[Cloudflare DNSSEC]
    DNS -->|Content Distribution| CDN[Global Edge CDN]
    CDN -->|Traffic Validation| WAF[Imunify360 Firewall]
    WAF -->|Safe Traffic| WebServer[LiteSpeed Enterprise Server]
    WebServer -->|Cache Hit| LSCache[(LSCache Engine)]
    WebServer -->|Database Query| DB[(MariaDB Enterprise)]
    WebServer -->|Storage| Storage[(NVMe SSD RAID-10)]
    Storage -.->|Daily Backup| OffsiteBackup[(Off-site Secure Storage)]

children.text: technical support via ticket and WhatsApp, with a maximum response time of
if hosting performance does not meet our specifications.
: Lease transactions (Ijarah) are carried out transparently without hidden fees (gharar).

dengan arsitektur RAID untuk perlindungan kehilangan data.

Berikut adalah gambaran arsitektur jaringan cloud hosting kami yang terintegrasi dengan CDN global dan perlindungan keamanan berlapis:

    DNS -->|Distribusi Konten| CDN[Global Edge CDN]
    CDN -->|Validasi Trafik| WAF[Imunify360 Firewall]

jika performa hosting tidak memenuhi standar spesifikasi yang kami tawarkan.

data.title: Cyber Security
data.description: OWASP Top-10 pentesting, zero-trust hardening, SOC advisory.

children.text: Comprehensive Cyber Security & Zero-Trust Hardening Services

Cyber threats are constantly evolving with increasingly sophisticated tactics. IT security is no longer an option, but a crucial necessity to protect your business reputation and continuity. AhliWeb delivers comprehensive cyber security services from penetration testing to industry-certified server hardening.
: Attack simulation on web apps, mobile apps (Android/iOS), and network infrastructure using
approach (never trust, always verify) to prevent unauthorized access.
: Compliance auditing for security standards to ensure alignment with local and global regulations.
: Consultation on establishing a Security Operations Center (SOC) and integrating SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) for
to restore systems, analyze digital forensics, and patch exploited vulnerabilities.
: AWCMS-Micro ecosystem — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and AI support.
: Burp Suite Professional, OWASP ZAP, MobSF (Mobile Security Framework), Frida
: Cloudflare WAF, ModSecurity, Fail2ban, SELinux / AppArmor
We design your cyber defense with a defense-in-depth principle to minimize the attack surface:

content.code:
graph TD
    Attacker[External Threat / Hacker] -->|Attack Attempt| Edge[Cloudflare WAF / DDoS Protection]
    Edge -->|Filtered Traffic| Gateway[VPN / Zero-Trust Network Access]
    Gateway -->|Multi-Factor Verification| Host[Server Hardened OS with SELinux]
    Host -->|Container Inspection| App[Docker Containerized App]
    App -->|Encrypted Query| DB[(AES-256 Encrypted Database)]
    Host -->|Send Security Logs| SIEM[Wazuh SIEM / SOC Analyzer]
    SIEM -->|Threat Notification| Response[AhliWeb Incident Response Team]

children.text: : We deliver a complete vulnerability report with remediation recommendations within
after security flaws are patched by your development team.
: We sign strict Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) to ensure your sensitive data and infrastructure are never leaked.
: Consultations and testing are carried out transparently based on package rates agreed upfront, without hidden costs.

data.title: Keamanan Siber
data.description: Pentest OWASP Top-10, zero-trust hardening, SOC advisory.

children.text: Layanan Keamanan Siber Menyeluruh & Hardening Zero-Trust

Ancaman siber terus berkembang dengan taktik yang semakin canggih. Keamanan sistem IT bukan lagi sekadar pelengkap, melainkan kebutuhan krusial untuk melindungi reputasi dan kelangsungan bisnis Anda. AhliWeb menghadirkan layanan keamanan siber komprehensif mulai dari pengujian penetrasi (Penetration Testing) hingga penguatan server (Server Hardening) bersertifikasi industri.
: Simulasi serangan siber pada aplikasi web, mobile (Android/iOS), dan infrastruktur jaringan menggunakan standar
(tidak ada kepercayaan tanpa verifikasi) untuk mencegah akses tidak sah.
: Audit kepatuhan standar keamanan data untuk memastikan kesesuaian dengan regulasi lokal maupun global.
: Konsultasi pendirian Security Operations Center (SOC) dan integrasi SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) untuk
untuk memulihkan sistem, menganalisis forensik digital, serta menutup celah keamanan yang dieksploitasi.
: Ekosistem AWCMS-Micro — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, dan dukungan AI.
: Burp Suite Professional, OWASP ZAP, MobSF (Mobile Security Framework), Frida
: Cloudflare WAF, ModSecurity, Fail2ban, SELinux / AppArmor
Kami merancang pertahanan siber Anda dengan prinsip pertahanan berlapis (defense-in-depth) untuk memperkecil permukaan serangan (attack surface):

content.code:
graph TD
    Attacker[Ancaman Luar / Peretas] -->|Percobaan Serangan| Edge[Cloudflare WAF / DDoS Protection]
    Edge -->|Trafik Terfilter| Gateway[VPN / Zero-Trust Network Access]
    Gateway -->|Verifikasi Multi-Faktor| Host[Server Hardened OS with SELinux]
    Host -->|Inspeksi Kontainer| App[Aplikasi Kontainerized Docker]
    App -->|Kueri Terenkripsi| DB[(Database Terenkripsi AES-256)]
    Host -->|Kirim Log Keamanan| SIEM[Wazuh SIEM / SOC Analyzer]
    SIEM -->|Notifikasi Ancaman| Response[Tim Incident Response AhliWeb]

children.text: : Kami memberikan laporan temuan kerentanan lengkap dengan rekomendasi perbaikan (remediasi) dalam waktu
(free retest) setelah celah keamanan diperbaiki oleh tim pengembang Anda.
: Kami menandatangani Perjanjian Kerahasiaan (Non-Disclosure Agreement) yang ketat untuk memastikan data sensitif dan infrastruktur Anda tidak dibocorkan.
: Transaksi konsultasi dan pengujian dilakukan secara jelas berdasarkan tarif paket yang disepakati di awal tanpa biaya tambahan tersembunyi.

data.title: ERP & Business Systems
data.description: Odoo Community & Enterprise implementation, data migration, training, SLA support.

children.text: ERP Odoo Implementation for Maximum Business Efficiency
Managing a growing business requires seamless coordination between departments. AhliWeb provides ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) solutions based on
(both Community and Enterprise editions) to integrate all your business operations—from purchasing, warehousing, sales, finance, to human resources.
: Integration of key modules such as CRM, Sales, Inventory (Multi-Warehouse), Purchasing, Accounting (with Indonesian localization), and HR/Payroll.
: Developing and customizing Odoo workflows using Python to fit your company's unique business processes.
: Secure migration of product, customer, supplier, and historical financial data from legacy systems (Excel/QuickBooks/SAP).
: Intensive guidance for internal teams to ensure smooth system adoption and proper Odoo operation.
: Post-go-live support to ensure smooth daily operations without disruptive downtime.
: AWCMS-Micro ecosystem — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and AI support.
: Odoo Community Edition (v16/v17/v18) & Odoo Enterprise Edition (integrated open-source project)
: Python, XML, JavaScript (OWL - Odoo Web Library)
: Cloudflare (CDN, WAF, Tunnel) in front of an Nginx reverse proxy, Let's Encrypt SSL/TLS
: Containerized Deployment with GitHub Actions CI/CD, reliable cloud hosting
The Odoo ERP system we implement centralizes all operational data into a single database, producing real-time reports instantly accessible to management:

content.code:
graph TD
    Sales[Sales & CRM Module] -->|Item Ordering| Inventory[Inventory & Warehouse Module]
    Purchasing[Purchasing Module] -->|Stock Purchasing| Inventory
    Inventory -->|Stock Movement & COGS| Accounting[Accounting & Finance Module]
    Sales -->|Invoicing & Receivables| Accounting
    HR[HR & Payroll Module] -->|Salary Expenses| Accounting
    Accounting -->|Data Synchronization| DB[(PostgreSQL Database)]
    DB -->|ROI Dashboard & Insights| Management[Real-Time Management Dashboard]

children.text: : Full database encryption, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), port firewall protection, and
: Critical issue ticket response (e.g. system down) in
: We ensure that operational and bookkeeping modules are designed free from prohibited transactions (usury, ambiguity, gambling) in your financial reporting schemes.

data.title: ERP & Manajemen Bisnis
data.description: Implementasi Odoo Community & Enterprise, migrasi data, pelatihan, SLA support.

children.text: Implementasi ERP Odoo untuk Efisiensi Bisnis Maksimal
Mengelola bisnis yang berkembang membutuhkan koordinasi yang mulus antar departemen. AhliWeb menyediakan solusi ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) berbasis
(baik Community maupun Enterprise) untuk mengintegrasikan seluruh operasional bisnis Anda—mulai dari pembelian, pergudangan, penjualan, keuangan, hingga manajemen sumber daya manusia.
: Integrasi modul-modul penting seperti CRM, Sales, Inventory (Multi-Warehouse), Purchasing, Accounting (lokalisasi Indonesia), dan HR/Payroll.
: Pengembangan dan kustomisasi alur Odoo (workflows) agar sesuai dengan proses bisnis unik perusahaan Anda menggunakan bahasa pemrograman Python.
: Layanan migrasi data produk, pelanggan, supplier, dan histori keuangan dari sistem lama (Excel/QuickBooks/SAP) secara aman.
: Pendampingan intensif bagi tim internal untuk memastikan adaptasi sistem berjalan lancar dan pengoperasian Odoo dilakukan dengan benar.
: Dukungan pasca-go-live untuk memastikan kelancaran operasional harian tanpa downtime yang mengganggu bisnis.
: Ekosistem AWCMS-Micro — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, dan dukungan AI.
: Odoo Community Edition (v16/v17/v18) & Odoo Enterprise Edition (proyek open-source yang diintegrasikan)
: Python, XML, JavaScript (OWL - Odoo Web Library)
: Cloudflare (CDN, WAF, Tunnel) di depan Nginx Reverse Proxy, SSL/TLS Let's Encrypt
: Containerized Deployment dengan GitHub Actions CI/CD, cloud hosting andal
Sistem ERP Odoo yang kami implementasikan memusatkan seluruh data operasional ke dalam satu basis data tunggal, menghasilkan laporan real-time yang dapat diakses secara instan oleh jajaran manajemen:

content.code:
graph TD
    Sales[Modul Sales & CRM] -->|Pemesanan Barang| Inventory[Modul Inventory & Warehouse]
    Purchasing[Modul Purchasing] -->|Pembelian Stok| Inventory
    Inventory -->|Mutasi Stok & HPP| Accounting[Modul Accounting & Keuangan]
    Sales -->|Faktur & Piutang| Accounting

data.title: Data & Analytics

: Designing interactive dashboards, pie charts, trend line graphs, and geographic heatmaps accessible by management

data.title: IoT & Smart Tech
data.description: ESP32-CAM, Jetson Nano, MQTT over TLS & Grafana dashboard.

children.text: Integrated Internet of Things (IoT) & Smart Tech Solutions

Enhancing industrial operational efficiency requires automation and real-time monitoring of your physical assets. AhliWeb delivers integrated hardware and software engineering for IoT (Internet of Things)—ranging from smart microcontroller sensors to AI-powered intelligent video analytics (Computer Vision).
: Continuous monitoring of environmental parameters (temperature, humidity, pressure, toxic gases) for factories, smart agriculture, and warehouses.
: Real-time GPS/GPRS tracking for logistics fleets or high-value physical assets, complete with live maps integration.
: Cost-effective camera module deployment for entrance monitoring, object verification, or automated meter reading.
: Implementing machine learning directly on edge devices for license plate recognition, PPE detection, or object counting.
: Interactive, easy-to-read data visualizations with automated alerts (via Telegram/WhatsApp) if sensor readings breach safe limits.
: AWCMS-Micro ecosystem — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and AI support.
: ESP32, ESP8266, STM32, Arduino, Raspberry Pi, NVIDIA Jetson Nano
: MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport) over TLS, HTTP REST API, WebSockets, LoRaWAN, Modbus RTU/TCP
: OpenCV, TensorFlow Lite, YOLO (You Only Look Once)
Our IoT systems are securely architected with TLS encryption from the physical sensor up to the monitoring dashboard:

content.code:
graph TD
    Sensors[Physical Sensors: Temp/Camera/GPS] -->|Analog/Digital Signal| MC[ESP32 / Jetson Nano Controller]
    MC -->|MQTT over TLS Encryption| Broker[MQTT Broker: EMQX / Mosquitto]
    Broker -->|Pub/Sub Stream| Processor[Node-RED / Python Backend]
    Processor -->|Time-series Storage| Influx[(InfluxDB / TimescaleDB)]
    Processor -->|Limit Breached| Alert[Alert System: Telegram/WhatsApp]
    Influx -->|Data Visualization| Grafana[Grafana Dashboard]
    Grafana -->|Instant Monitoring| Client[User / Management Dashboard]

children.text: : We guarantee a packet delivery rate of at least 98% under stable network conditions.
: Hardware enclosures are designed to meet industrial standards (IP65/IP67) for dust and water protection in the field.
: All data exchanges must pass through an encrypted TLS v1.3 MQTT broker to prevent eavesdropping and man-in-the-middle attacks.
: Custom hardware prototyping contracts are agreed under transparent purchase models (Salam or Istishna') with predefined materials, pricing, and timelines.

Meningkatkan efisiensi operasional industri memerlukan otomatisasi dan monitoring data secara real-time dari aset fisik Anda. : Visualisasi data sensor interaktif yang mudah dibaca dengan pengingat alert otomatis (Telegram/WhatsApp) jika pembacaan sensor melampaui batas aman.

graph TD

data.title: Geospatial & Mapping
data.description: QGIS, PostGIS, logistics routing & business heatmap.

children.text: Geographic Information System (GIS) & Digital Mapping Services

Almost every strategic business decision is closely linked to location data. AhliWeb delivers professional spatial mapping and interactive Web GIS application development to help you accurately analyze, visualize, and optimize geography-based decisions.
: Building custom interactive map dashboards with high performance for asset visualization, customer distribution, or critical infrastructure points.
: Spatial analysis to determine the best routes for logistics shipments (Vehicle Routing Problem) to save travel time and fuel consumption.
: Mapping market potential heatmaps, competitor locations, and determining strategic sites for new branches based on population density data.
: PostgreSQL/PostGIS implementations to process distance, polygon, and radius queries efficiently.
: Processing satellite imagery, digitizing raster maps into structured vector data, and integrating field survey data.
: AWCMS-Micro ecosystem — TypeScript + Astro, Cloudflare Workers/Pages/D1/R2, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and AI support.
: Leaflet.js, OpenLayers, MapLibre GL, Mapbox SDK
: GeoJSON, KML, Shapefile (SHF), GeoTIFF, WMS / WFS
Spatial Data Flow Architecture (Web GIS System)
Our interactive map dashboards process complex spatial queries from the PostGIS database to the user's browser efficiently:

content.code:
graph TD
    Client[User Browser / Interactive Map] -->|Area / Radius Query| WebApp[Web App: Leaflet.js / React]
    WebApp -->|Request Spatial API| Server[Node.js / Python API Server]
    Server -->|Spatial SQL Query| PostGIS[(PostgreSQL + PostGIS DB)]
    Server -. -->|Request Map Tiles / Raster| GeoServer[GeoServer WMS/WFS Engine]
    GeoServer -->|Render Raster/Vector Files| PostGIS
    GeoServer -.->|Map Cache| CDN[Cloudflare CDN Map Cache]
    CDN -->|Fast Map Loading| Client

children.text: : Geocoordinate processing is guaranteed to use the international standard
: Map tile loading speed for Web GIS dashboards is kept under

to ensure that proprietary asset or land data is protected.

data.title: Geospatial & Pemetaan

children.text: Layanan Sistem Informasi Geografis (SIG) & Pemetaan Digital

Hampir semua keputusan bisnis strategis berhubungan erat dengan data lokasi. AhliWeb menghadirkan layanan pemetaan spasial profesional dan pengembangan aplikasi Web GIS interaktif untuk membantu Anda menganalisis, memvisualisasikan, dan mengoptimalkan keputusan berbasis wilayah geospasial secara akurat.
: Pembuatan dasbor peta interaktif kustom berbasis web dengan performa tinggi untuk visualisasi aset, persebaran pelanggan, atau titik infrastruktur penting.
: Analisis spasial untuk menentukan rute pengiriman barang logistik terbaik (Vehicle Routing Problem) demi menghemat waktu tempuh dan konsumsi bahan bakar.
: Pemetaan heatmap potensi pasar, persebaran kompetitor, serta penentuan lokasi cabang baru yang strategis berdasarkan data kepadatan penduduk.
: Implementasi penyimpanan data geografis berbasis PostgreSQL/PostGIS yang andal untuk memproses query jarak, poligon, dan radius secara cepat.
: Pengolahan citra satelit, digitasi peta raster menjadi data vektor terstruktur, serta integrasi data survei lapangan.

data.title: Business Consulting
data.description: HODi Blueprint, competitor research & OKR workshop.

children.text: Professional Business Consulting & OKR Management Services

Success in digital transformation is not just about adopting new technology tools; it is about aligning business vision, organizational structure, and team execution measurably. AhliWeb delivers comprehensive business consulting services, ranging from digital organizational blueprinting to performance training using the OKR (Objectives and Key Results) methodology.
: A strategic framework for integrated digital transformation that aligns Sharia principles, human resources, business processes, and technology.
: In-depth market research and competitor analysis using verified secondary data to identify high-potential market gaps.
: Interactive training and mentoring for OKR adoption to define company goals and measurable team success indicators.
: Auditing and restructuring operational workflows to improve efficiency and reduce waste through lean management.
: Spatial SWOT analysis, digital maturity assessment, stakeholder interviews
: Corporate OKR alignment to team and individual OKRs, weekly check-in cadence
: KPI matrix, RACI responsibility charts, balanced scorecard
Our HODi methodology guides your organization toward efficient, aligned growth through these structured steps:

content.code:
graph TD
    Audit[Phase 1: Audit & Organizational Maturity Assessment] -->|Problem Identification| HODi[Phase 2: HODi Blueprint Formulation]
    HODi -->|Strategy Design| Target[Phase 3: Corporate & Department OKR Setting]
    Target -->|Onboarding & Workshop| Training[Phase 4: Team Onboarding & Pilot Project]
    Training -->|Weekly Execution| Review[Phase 5: Weekly / Quarterly OKR Review]
    Review -->|Iteration Loop| Audit

: During OKR implementation, our consulting team provides weekly check-in sessions for the first
: All recommendations, capital restructuring, and workflow contracts follow DSN-MUI fatwas and Islamic financial principles.

data.title: Konsultasi Bisnis
data.description: Blueprint HODi, riset kompetitor & OKR workshop.

children.text: Jasa Konsultasi Bisnis Profesional & Manajemen OKR

Sukses dalam transformasi digital bukan hanya tentang adopsi alat teknologi baru, melainkan tentang menyelaraskan visi bisnis, struktur organisasi, dan eksekusi tim secara terukur. AhliWeb menghadirkan layanan konsultasi bisnis komprehensif, mulai dari penyusunan cetak biru digital organisasi hingga pelatihan kinerja menggunakan metodologi OKR (Objectives and Key Results).
: Kerangka kerja strategis untuk transformasi digital terpadu yang menyelaraskan prinsip syariah, sumber daya manusia, proses bisnis, dan teknologi.
: Riset pasar mendalam dan analisis kompetitor berbasis data sekunder terverifikasi untuk menemukan celah pasar yang potensial.
: Pelatihan interaktif dan pendampingan implementasi OKR untuk merumuskan tujuan perusahaan serta menetapkan indikator keberhasilan tim yang terukur.
: Audit dan penyusunan ulang alur kerja operasional bisnis untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan mengurangi pemborosan melalui lean management.
: Analisis SWOT spasial, asesmen maturitas digital, wawancara pemangku kepentingan
: Penyelarasan OKR korporat ke OKR tim dan individu, ritme weekly check-in
: KPI matrix, RACI responsibility charts, balanced scorecard
Metodologi HODi kami mengarahkan organisasi Anda menuju pertumbuhan yang efisien dan selaras melalui langkah-langkah terstruktur berikut:

content.code:
graph TD
    Audit[Fase 1: Audit & Asesmen Kematangan Organisasi] -->|Identifikasi Masalah| HODi[Fase 2: Perumusan Cetak Biru HODi]
    HODi -->|Rancangan Strategi| Target[Fase 3: Penyusunan OKR Korporat & Departemen]
    Target -->|Sosialisasi & Workshop| Training[Fase 4: Pelatihan Tim & Pilot Project]
    Training -->|Eksekusi Mingguan| Review[Fase 5: Evaluasi OKR Mingguan / Kuartalan]
    Review -->|Siklus Iterasi| Audit

children.text: : Cetak biru digital diselesaikan dan diserahkan sebagai dokumen resmi terstruktur dalam maksimal
: Selama implementasi OKR, tim konsultan kami menyediakan sesi weekly check-in selama
: Seluruh saran bisnis, restrukturisasi modal, dan alur kontrak kerja disusun sesuai fatwa DSN-MUI.
